seoTitle: North Cape vs North Haven — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Cape and North Haven. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Cape vs North Haven: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Cape and North Haven.
heading: North Cape vs North Haven — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Cape, South Australia and North Haven, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Haven has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to North Cape (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Cape or North Haven safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Cape has a flood risk score of 29/100, while North Haven scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Cape scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. North Haven scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Cape or North Haven?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Haven has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
